backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining contact form submission and product management APIs with types for ContactFormEntry, ProductDetail (with specifications, nutrition, variants), and functions for CRUD operations on both entities.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting two completed features: increasing logo size in Navigation (h-16 to h-32, container h-24 to h-40) and Footer (h-14 to h-28) components by 100%.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files including styling, routing, pages (Home, Products, ProductDetail, ContactUs, Admin), hooks for backend integration, and component implementations with doubled logo sizes.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining CSS custom properties for light and dark modes including primary, secondary, muted, accent, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the FarmSiddhi React application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app with TanStack Router setup for 8 routes (Home, About, Products, ProductDetail, FarmerNetwork, Exports, Contact, Admin), QueryClient provider, InternetIdentity provider, shared Layout with Navigation/Footer, watermark background, and Toaster for notifications.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component with doubled logo (h-28), contact information placeholders, social media icons (LinkedIn, X, Facebook), and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation with doubled logo (h-32), increased container height (h-40), desktop/mobile menu for 7 routes including Admin, and active route highlighting with primary color.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning anonymous actor when unauthenticated and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for backend operations including contact form submission/retrieval and product detail queries (all products, by ID, and by category).
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light/dark themes, utility classes for sections, and a watermark background component with opacity adjustments.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutUs.tsx: About page displaying FarmSiddhi's vision, mission, and business model in card layouts with icons, plus additional content explaining the platform's value proposition.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin dashboard page that displays all contact form submissions in a table with loading/error states, user type badges, and submission counts.
frontend/src/pages/ContactUs.tsx: Contact page with a form for submitting inquiries (name, email, phone, message, user type) and a sidebar displaying contact information with icons.
frontend/src/pages/Exports.tsx: Displays export services page with quality assurance, packaging, logistics, global trade support, and compliance services. Includes a certifications section showcasing international standards.
frontend/src/pages/FarmerNetwork.tsx: Presents farmer network page highlighting direct procurement, fair pricing, aggregation platform, quality standardization, and supply chain digitization. Features a benefits section for farmers.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Homepage with hero section, services overview (aggregation, quality control, processing, packaging, logistics), and product showcase grid linking to individual product pages.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Dynamic product detail page that fetches products by category using useGetProductsByCategory hook, displays product information with image, and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/Products.tsx: Products catalog page displaying grid of product cards (rice, wheat, pulses, spices, processed foods, makhana) with images, descriptions, and varieties, linking to individual product detail pages.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration file defining custom color palette using OKLCH color space, extended theme with container settings, custom shadows, Inter font family, and accordion animations. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking file for FarmSiddhi corporate website with 6 main pages (Home, About, Products, Farmer Network, Exports, Contact), silver green/brown color scheme, and B2B export focus. Documents known issues with product detail pages not displaying properly and deployment errors.
